title: Thumper (creature)
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
{{Youmay|the cut [[Thumper (creature)|creature]] from the first draft of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|A New Hope]]|the instrument used in [[Electro-twang]]}}
'''Thumpers''' were eight-legged, furred [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]] native to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]].

[[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs]] caught and leashed a thumper shortly after he, [[Windy Starkiller|Windy]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[R2-D2/Legends|Artwo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] arrived at the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] village. He named it [[Amber (thumper)|Amber]], after his [[Amber (bodyguard)|bodyguard]].

==Sources==
